title: We need a visual reminder that timers are running

posts.author: MilesBennington (Miles Bennington)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We’re finding the time tracking surprisingly ineffective because people are forgetting to stop and start their timers.

It needs to be obvious at a glance which timers are running, even when you click away from tasks.

Kind regards
Miles

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MilesBennington!

Would setting up a status column help with these visual reminders? This way the status can align with whether the time-tracker is running or not?


Screen Shot 2023-02-22 at 12.55.51 pm564×528 18.4 KB

I understand it still requires team members to manually action a change (i.e set the status) , but it just might help make it visually more clear when the timer is running.

posts.author: MilesBennington (Miles Bennington)
posts.cookedHtml: Not really, we do a lot of board switching. People start a task, forget the timer is running and switch over to another board. It would be great if there was a little timer somewhere in the app that shows what is happening at any given moment.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Great feedback - thank you for sharing this!
